pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-012 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.410 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.410) and is in_scope for the AI Product Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level AI Product Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.410), and AI and Machine Learning handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML competencies for AI Product Manager at manager level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML overlap appears in 15-40% of AI Product Manager postings depending on seniority. Core signals: 1. OOS signals: 0.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for AI Product Manager. Final decision: exclude.
